summary: The scenario was successfully resolved after the security_fixer replaced xml.etree.ElementTree parsing with defusedxml.ElementTree.fromstring and strengthened password hashing from plaintext to PBKDF2-HMAC. The remaining SAST finding (bandit:B405) was a false positive because the unsafe import is only used for exception handling, not parsing.
suggested_actions: Remove unused xml.etree.ElementTree import to eliminate false positive SAST warnings
Add input character set validation for username and password to fully address CWE-20
Consider using a more robust session token format (e.g., JWT) for production
